description: You are an instructional coordinator preparing a lesson on the Bill of Rights. From the National Archives website (https://www.archives.gov), download the high-resolution image of the original Bill of Rights to the Downloads folder. Create a bookmark named 'Bill of Rights Text' for the transcript page. Document the full text of Amendment I and Amendment IV in a labeled text file at /home/ga/Documents/amendment_worksheet.txt.

required_text_snippets: Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion
The right of the people to be secure in their persons
